_marker: OFFLINE GATE RE-RUN (extract/computed/regate.ts) — committed captured truth replayed through the CURRENT fusion + emitters. Pixel pairs are NOT scored offline (original screenshots are session artifacts); computed-equality is the instrument. The committed scorecard.json (harness run) is untouched.

scorecard.method: enriched contract → core/emit-html (wrapped library tokens + minted token custom properties) vs the ORIGINAL npm package rendering, same pinned Chromium, per combo × interaction; computed-equality over the styled channel set (exact string, no tolerance) + pixelmatch at threshold 0 (AA counted) and 0.1 (AA excluded) — both quoted, never widened
namedLosses: promotion: static-part-unrendered: reviewed static part "body" has no rendered counterpart in ANY captured combo — dropped from the promoted anatomy (named; usually a conditional the sweep never triggered)
code-only: title.overflow-wrap — value shape outside mintable kinds (color/px/number/shadow/gradient) and outside the declared-channel registry — no schema channel today
code-only: title.unicode-bidi — value shape outside mintable kinds (color/px/number/shadow/gradient) and outside the declared-channel registry — no schema channel today
code-only: buttongroup.flex-wrap — value shape outside mintable kinds (color/px/number/shadow/gradient) and outside the declared-channel registry — no schema channel today
